exemplar.title:
How does the use of rhetorical strategies and language in the first 2024 presidential
debate between Trump and Biden reflect underlying socio-political tensions in the
United States?

detailedExemplarData.title:
How does the use of rhetorical strategies and language in the first 2024 presidential
debate between Trump and Biden reflect underlying socio-political tensions in the
United States?

subject.title: English B
subject.description:
**IB English B** is a **Group 2** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **language acquisition through five prescribed themes: identities, experiences, human ingenuity, social organization, and sharing the planet**, with a strong focus on **developing receptive, productive, and interactive communication skills in English as a second language**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2025**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| **Assessment** | **Format** | **SL** | **HL** | **Weighting** |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Paper 1** | Productive skills - writing | 1 hour | 1 hour 15 minutes | 25% |
| **Paper 2** | Receptive skills - listening and reading comprehension | 1 hour 45 minutes | 2 hours | 50% |
| **Individual Oral** | Internal assessment - oral communication | 15 min prep + 10 min exam | 15 min prep + 10 min exam | 25% |

strengths: Topic is communicated accurately and effectively with a sustained, clear purpose and focus.
Research question is sharply stated and tightly linked to every section of the essay.
Methodology is complete, with clear evidence of thoughtful selection of primary and secondary sources.
weaknesses: Opening paragraph is occasionally verbose, slightly diluting focus.
Methodology section lacks explicit discussion of source-selection criteria and limitations.
Conclusion restates findings without explicitly revisiting the research question.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The studentâs title, introduction and sub-headings consistently communicate a precise focus (Band 5â6), and the research question drives every analytical move (Band 5â6). The methodology is fully described and grounded in an informed qualitative approach, meriting the top of the band. Minor verbosity and absence of limitations discussion prevent a perfect narrative flow but do not undermine the overall completeness and focus.

strengths: Use of transcript extracts, polling figures and academic texts is generally relevant and integrated.
Subject knowledge of rhetorical theory and U.S. socio-political context is clear and coherent.
Terminology (e.g., populism, hyperbole, ad hominem) is used accurately and consistently.
weaknesses: Some quotations are inserted without analysis or precise citation details.
Economic statistics are at times de-contextualized and lack full bibliographic information.
Occasional theoretical points (e.g., differentiation of hyperbole) need clearer conceptual framing.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Source material is mostly relevant and appropriately applied, but dropped-in quotations and incomplete citation details keep this in the mid band (3â4). The student demonstrates clear and coherent knowledge, though occasional descriptive passages and citation gaps prevent elevation to the top band.

strengths: Research draws effectively on a solid mix of primary and secondary sources with clear relevance to the research question.
Analysis is well-developed, synthesizing theoretical insights and examples in a coherent comparative framework.
Discussion offers a focused, reasoned argument about how rhetorical strategies reflect socio-political tensions.
weaknesses: Some analytical passages remain descriptive; they could more explicitly link instances back to the research question.
Limited counter-argument or alternative interpretation reduces depth of evaluation.
Micro-analytical details (e.g., linguistic level) are occasionally omitted.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work demonstrates good-to-excellent critical thinking: sources are consistently pertinent, analysis is generally rich and supports conclusions (Band 7â9), and the discussion is focused and coherent. While there are minor descriptive drifts and a lack of counter-perspective, the overall argumentative quality justifies a high mark within the 7â9 band.

strengths: Structure is clearly appropriate and complete, with well-labeled sections and logical flow.
Layout conventions (title page, headings, page numbering) are consistently applied.
Bibliography and section headers aid reader orientation.
weaknesses: Table of contents numbering does not always match actual pagination.
Raw HTML tags appear in a section header, affecting professional presentation.
Heading levels are inconsistently applied between parallel sections.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Minor formatting and navigation glitches are present, but the overall structure and layout fully satisfy the upper band descriptor. The report is professional and reader-friendly, meriting a top-band mark in Presentation.

strandSelections.reasoning: The research question is explicitly stated, sharply worded, and tightly linked to the subsequent argument (âHow does the use of rhetorical strategies â¦ reflect underlying socio-political tensions?â).  All body sections and sub-headings map directly onto this question, demonstrating consistent focus.  Occasional digressions into background statistics do not seriously weaken that connection, so the strand merits the upper band.

Analytical passages compare each candidateâs use of the three strategies and link them to social tensions, showing reasonable depth.  Yet discussion sometimes drifts into description and lacks counter-argument or close linguistic micro-analysis.  Minor inconsistencies preclude the 7-9 band but satisfy âanalysis is good with minor inconsistenciesâ (score 5).

The transcript extracts, polling figures and academic texts are well chosen and generally integrated into the prose, demonstrating mostly relevant application.  Some quotations are dropped in without analysis or lack precise citation details, preventing full marks but satisfying the 3-4 descriptor.

The essay shows correct title, word count, bibliography style, and apparent page numbering (section markers).  Headings are clearly distinguished and font conventions are consistent.  Minor formatting glitches (broken URLs, stray mathematical symbols) prevent perfection but the layout meets EE requirements, warranting the 3-4 band.

The student displays clear knowledge of rhetorical theory and current U.S. socio-political context, drawing on Aristotle, Lakoff, Mudde, etc.  Use of this knowledge is coherent but occasionally descriptive, and economic statistics are sometimes de-contextualised.  Overall the work fits âknowledge is clear with partially effective use of sourcesâ.

A logical introduction, section headings, conclusion and bibliography are present, and the sequence broadly aids understanding.  Some table-of-contents numbering mismatches the actual pagination and internal sign-posting occasionally falters, but overall the structure is clearly appropriate and complete, meriting the upper band here.

The research draws on a solid spread of primary (transcript, video) and secondary sources that are generally pertinent to the question; however, some evidence cited (e.g., inflation figures) is only tangentially analysed.  Relevance is clear though not wholly consistent, fitting mid-band (4-6) with 5 as an appropriate score.

The studentâs title, opening paragraph and introduction all communicate a precise focus on the first 2024 Biden-Trump debate and clearly state that the essay will examine three rhetorical strategies in relation to underlying socio-political tensions.  The framing is specific to an English-B Category 2 study, is entirely appropriate, and is sustained throughout the essay.  Minor verbosity occasionally blurs emphasis, but overall purpose and focus remain clear and appropriate, justifying a high-band placement.

The essay arrives at clear comparative conclusions about how each rhetorical strategy mirrors distinct socio-political anxieties.  Nonetheless, evaluation of implications is brief and there is limited reflection on alternative interpretations, producing a competent but not fully coherent argument â placing it at the lower end of the 4-6 band.

The methodology is explained (qualitative rhetorical analysis of the debate transcript supported by secondary scholarship and polling data) and the works cited list is substantial.  Evidence of deliberate source selection is present, yet there is no discussion of selection criteria, limitations, or data-handling procedures.  Hence the methodology is âmostly complete with some evidence of informed selectionâ, aligning with the 3-4 band.

Key rhetorical terms (populism, hyperbole, ad hominem, cognitive framing) are used accurately and consistently.  Minor slips in punctuation and formulae do not undermine conceptual accuracy.  This aligns with âterminology mostly accurateâ, meriting the upper edge of the 3-4 band.

annotations.comment: Consider removing all HTML table tags and using the documentâs native TOC feature to present a more polished layout without code artifacts.
The phrase âsubsequent essaysâ is confusing here; it should refer to sections or parts of this same essay to maintain consistency.
The section header âAnalysis of Rhetorical Strategiesâ clearly signals the shift to the core argument and supports reader orientation.
The title precisely communicates the research focus on rhetorical strategies and socio-political tensions in the debate, fulfilling the requirement for a clear and appropriate investigation title.
The research question is clearly and sharply stated, tightly aligned with subsequent sections and guiding the essayâs analytical focus effectively.
The word count is provided and remains within the 4 000-word limit, demonstrating compliance with formatting requirements.
Raw HTML tags appear in the section header, undermining professional presentation. Remove markup so âTable of contentsâ displays cleanly.
The table of contents includes page numbers that do not always match the actual pagination. Verify and update to ensure accuracy and ease of navigation.
The introduction is wellâstructured and sets context, definitions, and significance of the study, guiding the reader smoothly into the topic.
The opening paragraph is verbose, which dilutes the research focus. Streamline sentences to highlight the research question and methodology rationale.
Citations of Aristotle would benefit from page or section numbers to increase precision and allow readers to locate the passage easily.
This long sentence spans multiple lines and hinders readability. Breaking it into shorter units will improve clarity.
A stray mathematical symbol appears at the bottom of the page. Remove or clarify this notation to maintain formatting consistency.
The methodology section outlines qualitative analysis but lacks details on source selection criteria and limitations. Include these to strengthen methodological rigor.
The clearly labeled âMain bodyâ section aids reader navigation and demonstrates appropriate structural conventions.
The analysis of Trumpâs economic populism skilfully integrates Mudde & Kaltwasserâs framework with transcript evidence, demonstrating clear subject knowledge.
Consider discussing a potential counterargument: how might these populist appeals fail or alienate moderate voters? This deepens critical evaluation.
Comparative claims would be strengthened by citing specific transcript excerpts for each point, making the contrast more concrete and evidence-based.
The comparative section on hyperbole synthesizes theoretical insights and examples effectively, strengthening the argumentative coherence.
Discussion of Trumpâs ad hominem lacks analysis of its differential impact across voter demographics; consider how various audiences respond.
Some of Bidenâs ad hominem examples are missing timestamps. Include precise time references for consistency and verifiability.
Statistical references to inflation and inequality lack full citation details (dates, exact survey names). Add complete references for clarity and credibility.
Use consistent heading levels: if Trumpâs populism is at level-2, ensure Bidenâs section matches to reinforce parallel structure.
A stray inline formula â\frac{1}{2}â appears in the text without context. Remove or explain this notation to preserve formatting integrity.
Define clearly how hyperbole differs from general exaggeration and tie the theoretical distinction to the examples that follow.
Analysis of Trumpâs hyperbole is descriptive; explicitly link each instance back to the research question on socio-political tensions.
The definition of ad hominem based on Walton (1998) is concise and accurately sets the stage for the analysis.
Consider quantifying the number of ad hominem instances for each candidate to provide empirical support for the comparative analysis.
The CNN debate transcript entry includes stray HTML and broken URL tags. Clean up URL formatting and remove markup for clarity.
The conclusion restates findings but does not explicitly revisit the research question. Reaffirm the question and summarise how each strategy addressed it.
Verify each citation for completeness: ensure publication years, page numbers, and DOI/URL accuracy are present for all sources.
Bibliography entries vary in URL style, italics, and punctuation. Standardise formatting (e.g., APA or MLA) to ensure consistency.
